arts.ttl: Papers: Ipswich striker Delap emerges as Chelsea target
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Leicester City to Remove Main Kit Sponsor During Season?
arts.sum: Leicester City is at serious risk of losing its main sponsor during the season.

arts.ttl: Five players could miss Leicester vs Chelsea as two huge blows confirmed and new Reece James update
arts.sum: Maresca commented on Palmer pulling out of England duty saying: "To be honest, after we played Arsenal I left for one week [on holiday] so I don't know about the conversations between the club and the international teams." Maresca said: "We have, for sure, just one injured player and that is Reece [James.] Unfortunately, he felt something small and we do not want to take a risk with him at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Reece James makes injury vow after latest Chelsea setback
arts.sum: Reece James addresses his latest hamstring injury on social media.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face bittersweet nightmare scenario that could cost Man City millions despite warning
arts.sum: "I think we are close to that," said the Manchester City midfielder when asked if players could begin to strike or refuse to play. With players entitled to at least three weeks off, those at Chelsea and Manchester City will have very little time to unwind physically and mentally.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Chelsea star embarrasses Cole Palmer as Enzo Maresca sent cheeky three-word message
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters ahead of the Leicester City clash, Maresca was quizzed on Palmer's role in the Chelsea lineup and whether he could play alongside Joao Felix. Jadon Sancho has poked fun at Cole Palmer ahead of Chelsea's clash against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Juventus eyeing Cesare Casadei as Chelsea midfielder’s future uncertain
arts.sum: Juventus has reignited its interest in Cesare Casadei, the talented 2003-born midfielder currently with Chelsea, after a pause in discussions over recent months. Casadei, who has struggled to secure a place in Enzo Maresca’s plans at Chelsea, could represent a valuable opportunity for the Bianconeri as his playing time diminishes. Calciomercato report how over the past two years, Casadei has been on loan at Reading and Leicester City to gain experience and develop his skills. This summer, he opted to stay at Chelsea, reuniting with his former coach Maresca. However, his season has been disappointing, featuring only four appearances primarily The post Juventus eyeing Cesare Casadei as Chelsea midfielder’s future uncertain appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Many Chelsea fans want their ‘incredible’ player to get a rare Premier League start vs Leicester
arts.sum: Chelsea begin an extremely busy run of fixtures with a trip to Leicester City on Saturday afternoon. The Blues still have to play 11 games...

arts.ttl: Man United looking to emulate Chelsea all-time winning feat in Ruben Amorim's first game
arts.sum: Manchester United will aim to make it 10 straight away league victories over promoted teams when they head to Portman Road to face Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Report: £50m Chelsea player Enzo Maresca keeps overlooking could get escape route in January
arts.sum: Chelsea have a very strong and big squad, and inevitably some of the players will struggle to get into the team. Christopher Nkunku is not...
